title: Webhooks Router — Outbox Pattern & Jira/ServiceNow Signature Verification
description: webhooks_router.py implements JiraWebhookPayload, ServiceNowWebhookPayload, status mapping, OutboxRequest pattern, and HMAC signature verification. test_webhooks_router_unit.py and test_webhooks_router_outbox.py confirm both inbound and outbound paths. Gap: the outbox pattern stores events but the delivery worker that drains the outbox is not started — outbox records accumulate without being delivered.
missing: Outbox delivery worker: background thread that polls outbox.db every 5 seconds, delivers pending events via httpx, and marks them delivered or failed
Dead letter queue: after 3 failed delivery attempts, move outbox record to dead_letter.db and alert on-call via notification_engine
Webhook retry with exponential backoff: implement 1s/5s/30s retry intervals with jitter for transient delivery failures
